results.name: paste
results.notes: Paste 12-step ramps for gray/blue/red/green/orange/yellow/purple/cyan/pink. Default accent = blue.60 (Twilio brand).

results.name: lightning
results.notes: SLDS cool-gray + warm-gray + blue/green/red/orange/yellow ramps (steps 1-13). Default accent = BLUE_4 (Salesforce brand).

results.name: primer
results.notes: Primer 10-step scales for gray/blue/green/red/orange/yellow/purple/pink/coral. Functional mapping: surface = white, text = gray.9, accent = blue.5 (Primer's --color-accent-emphasis), critical = red.5, success = green.5, warning = yellow.5, info = blue.5.
